_note: ILLUSTRATIVE VALUES — voyage-level reroute seed. A reroute belongs to a VOYAGE (loading zone -> discharge port), not to a corridor: this file records, per disrupted corridor, what actually happens to cargo that normally transits it — the feasible alternate sea routes (added days / freight multiplier), or the honest 'no maritime alternative' with the physical bypass and its capacity. Days/multipliers are hand-seeded plausible estimates (only Suez->Cape +14d is a real anchor), same status as dsm_params.json. modeled_corridor references one of the 8 known corridor ids when the alternate is itself modeled; null = a real-world route outside the model (informational only). Tracked in CLAUDE.md backlog for calibration.

strait_of_hormuz.description: Only maritime exit from the Persian Gulf. A closure strands in-Gulf loadings — there is NO sea detour to India.

bypass.description: Saudi East-West pipeline to Red Sea ports + ADNOC Habshan-Fujairah line (Fujairah loads OUTSIDE the strait)

strait_of_hormuz.fallback_advice: re-source from alternate origins (procurement mix) or bridge from SPR

bab_el_mandeb.description: Red Sea southern gate for Atlantic/Mediterranean-origin cargo bound for India.
bab_el_mandeb.fallback_advice: divert around Africa; re-source only if the Cape also degrades

suez_canal.description: Mediterranean/Black-Sea-origin cargo bound for India via the Red Sea.
suez_canal.fallback_advice: divert around Africa; SUMED pipeline relieves part of the canal flow

cape_of_good_hope.description: Atlantic-origin cargo (West Africa, Americas) rounding Africa to India.
cape_of_good_hope.fallback_advice: route via Suez/Red Sea when open; West African loadings lose little either way

malacca_strait.description: East-bound lane; for India-bound crude mostly relevant to Far-East loadings.
malacca_strait.fallback_advice: short archipelago detours exist — minor delay, no re-sourcing needed

turkish_straits.description: Black-Sea export outlet (CPC blend, Urals loadings).
turkish_straits.fallback_advice: no sea detour from inside the Black Sea — substitute Baltic loadings of the same grades

alternatives.alt_route: baltic loading via danish_straits (substitute export outlet)

danish_straits.description: Baltic export outlet for Russian/North-European grades.
danish_straits.fallback_advice: substitute Black-Sea loadings of comparable grades

alternatives.alt_route: black sea loading via turkish_straits (substitute export outlet)

panama_canal.description: Minor for India-bound crude; matters for US Gulf cargo taking the Pacific routing.
panama_canal.fallback_advice: round South America or take the Atlantic routing via the Cape
